name: Secrets Manager secret rotation disabled
description: Automatic rotation is not enabled for this secret. Long-lived static credentials increase the risk of compromise through leakage, shoulder surfing, or credential stuffing. Without rotation, a compromised secret remains valid indefinitely.
remediation: Enable automatic rotation using a Lambda rotation function. AWS provides managed rotation functions for RDS, Redshift, DocumentDB, and other services. Set a rotation schedule of 30–90 days. Use the SecretsManagerReadWrite managed policy for the rotation Lambda.
